title: Go in your Lamborghini, sweep the streets: Karnataka High Court slams traffic rules violator
description: The owner of green Lamborghini, who was captured on video driving the car recklessly, was asked by the Karnataka High Court to undertake community service as condition to quash the criminal case against him [Chiranth BR v State of Karnataka]Justice M Nagaprasanna passed the direction while agreeing to quash the criminal case lodged against the accused Chiranth BR.The judge said that he will pass a detailed order to that effect.Justice M NagaprasannaThe Court was hearing a plea by Chiranth to qua
